page_metadata.biotools__summary: Given a dated species tree S, a set of gene trees G, and a set of costs for gene events (duplications, transfers and losses), the program computes the score of a most parsimonious reconciliation (MPR).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Given a dated species tree S, a set of gene trees G, and a set of costs for gene events (duplications, transfers and losses), the program computes the score of a most parsimonious reconciliation (MPR).
